commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get nodes -o wide 2>&1'
echo === all pods on all nodes ===
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods --all-namespaces -o wide 2>&1 | grep -v kube-system | grep -v eks-utils'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio describe node ip-10-1-12-160.us-east-2.compute.internal 2>&1 | grep -A 5 Taints'
